movement_has_direction.name: movement_has_direction
movement_has_direction.value: "stock_moves"."from_location_id" IS NOT NULL OR "stock_moves"."to_location_id" IS NOT NULL

movement_not_same_location.name: movement_not_same_location
movement_not_same_location.value: "stock_moves"."from_location_id" IS NULL OR "stock_moves"."to_location_id" IS NULL OR "stock_moves"."from_location_id" <> "stock_moves"."to_location_id"
